overall.description: Third-person game footage showing a cloaked character exploring a hazy alien grassland with red vegetation and industrial ruins. The character moves steadily through tall grass toward large rock formations under a golden sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial edge with tall alien grass

events.description: character moves away from industrial storage tanks into open grassland
character begins running through denser vegetation toward distant rock

agents.ego_description: character in yellow cloak runs away from industrial structures into a field of tall red grass

entered.detail: large cylindrical metal tanks with connecting pipes
tall reddish-orange grass covering the ground
massive boulder visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins near industrial storage tanks on the right, with the character running through tall red grass. The scene transitions from an industrial perimeter into an open alien grassland with purple-leaved trees scattered around.

events.description: large monolith rock becomes clearly visible ahead
blue wildflowers appear in the grass on the right

agents.ego_description: character runs steadily toward a large rock formation in the distance

entered.detail: clusters of blue flowers in the grass

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the open grassland as the large monolith rock grows larger in view. Industrial structures fade behind while blue wildflowers appear in the foreground.

events.description: character navigates around the left side of the large monolith
entering area with scattered rocks and twisted tree formations

agents.ego_description: character circles around the large boulder and moves through an area with scattered rocks and a distinctive twisted tree

entered.detail: gnarled dead tree trunk with twisted branches
small to medium rocks scattered in the grass
hazy mountain range on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the large monolith, revealing a twisted dead tree and scattered rocks. The terrain becomes rockier as distant mountains become visible through the haze.

events.description: terrain becomes more rugged with large boulder formations

agents.ego_description: character continues running through rocky terrain navigating between large boulders

entered.detail: large rock formation with rough texture
rolling hills visible through the atmospheric haze

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character navigating through a rockier area with large boulders and outcrops. The vegetation thins as the character approaches distant hills under the hazy golden sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an industrial perimeter into a rugged, alien wilderness under a hazy golden sky. It begins with the character running past industrial storage tanks through tall red grass, which gradually opens into a vast grassland dotted with purple-leaved trees. As the character advances, the industrial structures fade into the background and blue wildflowers emerge in the foreground while a massive monolith rock grows larger in view. The scene then shifts as the camera moves past the monolith to reveal a twisted dead tree and scattered rocks, with distant mountains becoming visible through the haze. Finally, the terrain becomes increasingly rocky with large boulders and outcrops as the vegetation thins, leading the character toward distant hills.
